Align your boundary to the map
Your red-line image is overlaid on the satellite. Drag it over the matching fields and set the real width, then let AI detect the boundary — or trace it yourself.

Manual grid bounds
Enter the BNG grid values from the map edges. Eastings are on the top/bottom axis; northings on the left/right axis.

Adjust boundary scale
AI couldn't read the map scale. Drag the slider until the red boundary matches the correct real-world size on the satellite.
